fields.name: filteredData
fields.description: The data returned after applying access control filters.
fields.synonyms: filtered items, processed data, results, output

fields.name: inputCount
fields.description: The number of records processed by the access control.
fields.synonyms: record count, item count, total records

fields.name: outputCount
fields.description: The number of records that passed the access control filter.

fields.name: accessDenied
fields.description: Indicates whether access is denied based on configured rules.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Restrict who sees records
overridableConfigKeys.description: Only let people see records they own, or that match an allowed role. Off by default.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: enable, turn on, enforce, require, activate, apply, switch on, only owner can edit, owner-only, private to owner, only see your own, restrict to role, role-based visibility, permission gate, admin-only access, hide from other users, only show mine, ownership scoping

overridableConfigKeys.label: Owner field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Row field holding the owning user id (blank disables owner filter)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Allowed roles
overridableConfigKeys.description: Roles permitted to see any row (empty = no role gate)
